company.name_jp: 株式会社エターナルサイエンス

research_notes: Found executive information on company profile page (https://www.eternal.co.jp/company/index.html). Listed 3 officers: Chairman (齊藤邦彦), President (齋藤隆), Outside Director (鈴木正剛). Established 1975-03-20 (Showa 50), capital 40M yen. Located in Kawasaki, Kanagawa (武蔵小杉). Over 50 years of software development history. IT consulting, software design/development, package software. Public infrastructure (power, gas, water, highway, railway), medical/welfare, industrial sectors. KIA member. Had LA subsidiary (closed).
